subject: This is ridiculous
body: Third time this week your dashboard has gone down during our standup. We're seriously evaluating alternatives.

subject: Dashboard weird
body: The dashboard is weird since yesterday.

subject: Production outage
body: Our team has been unable to access the dashboard since 09:14 UTC. Around 200 internal users are blocked. Logs attached show 502s from the API gateway, traced to repeated upstream timeouts.

subject: Feature request + complaint
body: Can you add bulk export? Also the existing export is too slow and crashes on more than 10k rows.

subject: API auth
body: Getting 401s after rotating my key. Following the docs at /auth/rotate but the new key returns invalid.
